add_key.method: OBD adaptation when the immobiliser PIN or cluster security data is available
add_key.programming_method: Identify Immo2 or Immo3 and the fitted instrument cluster before selecting the procedure
warnings: No operation-specific tool is shown until exact UK Golf Mk4 coverage is verified from a current manufacturer application list.

all_keys_lost.method: Acquire the required immobiliser PIN or cluster data, prepare the correct transponder and adapt all keys
warnings: Do not combine Immo2 and Immo3 procedures or erase keys before the required security data has been secured.

add_key.programming_method: Identify the cluster manufacturer and memory type before programming

obdstar_g3.summary: Volkswagen Immo IV key programming is supported, but the exact Golf cluster must be identified first.

all_keys_lost.method: Read the required Immo IV dashboard data, prepare a dealer key and learn all keys

all_keys_lost.online_requirement: Not Required for the documented bench-data route

obdstar_g3.summary: Supports Volkswagen Immo IV NEC dashboard data reading and AKL when the dashboard is one of the supported types.

vehicle_connection.display_text: VW4-AKL cable to supported NEC+24C32, NEC+24C64 or 873B-NEC95320 dashboard

warnings: Only use this route after confirming the exact dashboard processor and EEPROM family.
Stable regulated power is required for bench reading and key learning.

add_key.method: Diagnostic or saved immobiliser-data route depending on the fitted dashboard

obdstar_g3.summary: Volkswagen Immo IV key programming is supported where the exact dashboard appears in the current device coverage.

all_keys_lost.online_requirement: Not Required for the documented bench-data route

obdstar_g3.summary: Supports AKL on supported Volkswagen Immo IV NEC dashboards using the dedicated cable route.

vehicle_connection.display_text: VW4-AKL cable to a supported NEC+24C32, NEC+24C64 or 873B-NEC95320 dashboard

warnings: Do not assume every Golf Mk6 dashboard is covered by the same cable or data route.

golf_mk6_2009_2013_keyed.selection_note: Do not choose between Challenge and later trade classifications by year alone.

autel_im508s_xp400_pro.summary: Autel documents Add Key support for specified Johnson Controls MQB Golf dashboards from 2013–2017.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Standard OBD after confirming a supported dashboard part number

warnings: Documented support is dashboard-part-number specific, including 5G0920861, 5G0920861A and 5G1920741.
Check the current Autel vehicle menu and server availability before programming.

obdstar_g3.summary: Supports MQB key programming where the dashboard is a supported MQB48 5A/5B type.

vehicle_connection.display_text: OBD or dashboard-data route depending on the fitted MQB dashboard

warnings: Identify MQB5A, MQB5B or MQB5C before proceeding; MQB5C is not covered by the documented G3 solution.

all_keys_lost.method: Read the supported MQB dashboard data, calculate the required security data, prepare the dealer key and learn all keys

obdstar_g3.summary: OBDSTAR documents MQB48 5A/5B blade and proximity AKL support with dashboard data acquisition.

vehicle_connection.display_text: RH850/V850 dashboard adapter route where required

warnings: Confirm the dashboard processor and MQB generation before removal or reading.

Do not treat this as All Keys Lost support.

all_keys_lost.method: No universal aftermarket AKL coverage claim
